title: Thought, History, and Literature of Islamic Civilization Doctorate Degree Application and Feeds
content:
Thought, History, and Literature of Islamic Civilization Doctorate Degree Application and Feeds

Thought, History and Literature of Islamic Civilization PhD Program

2022-2023 Spring Semester Online Applications will start on

12.12.2022

. Registrations can be made until

20th January, 2023

via the link below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

The language of the program is Turkish.

Application Requirements

Candidates who have a

graduate

degree

with a thesis can apply to the program. For those, who studied abroad, it is required to have an equivalency certificate given by YÖK (High Education Board).

ALES certificate of the last 5 years (A score of 55 and above)

ALES is not required for PhD graduates. ALES score is accepted as 75 for PhD degree holders.

ALES score is accepted as 75 for foreign students.

Applicants who hold a Master’s Degree, should have a grade point average of at least 3 out 4.

Applicants should have a language score of minimum 55 and above from the exams accepted by YÖK (High Education Board).

Quota for the Spring Semester of the 2022-2023 academic year

About the Entrance Exam

Entrance Exam Date (written):

21.01.2023

23.01.2023 (Time of the exam will be announced later)

Place of Exam

: Institute for Sufi Studies / Üsküdar University South

Campus A Block

Evaluation

Candidates will be ranked according to the scores obtained by taking 50% of the ALES score, 20% of the undergraduate grade score average and 30% of the entrance exam score. Additionally 30% of the entrance exam (20% written and 10% oral) will be added to the score.

Candidates who scored below 50 out of 90 are not qualified for the oral exam. At the end of the evaluation, those who score at least 70 points, are ranked to the quota accordingly.

About the Language Proficiency

Students who have been admitted to the PhD program will be obliged to document their proficiency in at least one of the languages of Ottoman Turkish, Arabic or Persian, which are considered as the research languages of the program.

Announcement of Exam Results

The result of the exam will be notified to the candidates via e-mail on

Thusday, January 26th, 2023.

Registration Process

Students who are eligible to enroll in the program can apply to the Student Affairs between

January 30th to February 10th, 2023.

Documents Required for Registration

Undergraduate of Institute Diploma

ALES certificate (obtained within last five years)

Language certificate

Copy of ID

Photo

Information on the fees can be obtained from:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fee
